id.description: Unique identifier (but not used as the identifier: see 'altName' below)

altName.description: Alternative name, e.g. a slug. At present, this (not 'id') functions as the identifier of the project, to be used as the {id} part in the paths of WSAPI endpoints that operate on individual projects.

action.description: At the moment, self-documentation is all we can do: see CYCLOPS-12

mouLink.description: An optional link to a memorandom of understanding

funds.description: A list of the project's funds which can be used to action spectres

people.description: The people associated with the project and their roles

items.description: A single person associated with the project

xid.description: An external identified, opaque to CCMS, of a user in the system that is communicating with CCMS, with user administation being handled by that system

role.description: One of a small set of roles that a person have in a project (e.g. 'admin', 'editor', 'viewer')

locations.description: The locations that can act as sources and destinations for the action associated with this project

items.description: A single location used by the project

tracks.description: The tracks within the project that a given spectre can be associated with

items.description: A singe track within the project
